node_1: general convex and compact strategy sets
edge: General convex and compact strategy sets are prevalent in fundamental models used in economics and multiagent systems.
The introduced uncoupled learning algorithm achieves a regret bound of O(log T ) per player in general convex games.
The learning dynamics are based on optimistic follow-the-regularized-leader method using a self-concordant regularizer that does not act as a barrier for the feasible region.
Efficient implementation of the learning dynamics is possible with access to a proximal oracle for the convex strategy set.
Extensions of the learning dynamics are provided for scenarios with access to only a linear optimization oracle.
